question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/record/RecordParserProperties.java -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: getStreamType()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a flood of valid Hedera transactions that produce oversized record files, causing the RecordParserProperties-configured parser (StreamType.RECORD) to stall at the queueCapacity=10 default, effectively halting mirror node record ingestion for all users without any economic cost to the attacker?
